#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""DESI BAO n=6 Scan — Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument Year-1 results.

Enhanced scan of DESI 2024 BAO measurements for n=6 arithmetic patterns.

Physics background:
  Baryon Acoustic Oscillations (BAO) are frozen sound waves from the early
  universe. The BAO scale (~150 Mpc) acts as a standard ruler, allowing
  precise distance measurements at different redshifts.

  DESI Year-1 (arXiv:2404.03002, DR1) measured:
    - D_M/r_d: comoving angular diameter distance / so
